channel.title: Ops Knowledge Garden
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Ops Knowledge Garden

item.title: Training FTOs
item.description: Training FTOs Training a field training officer is different from training an EMT.

item.title: The Debrief
item.description: The Debrief The debrief is the most underused tool in EMS leadership. Most supervisors skip it, rush it, or do it wrong.

item.title: Operational Metrics
item.description: Operational Metrics Most EMS supervisors inherit a dashboard full of numbers and no clear sense of which ones actually matter or what to do when they move.

item.title: Leadership Philosophy
item.description: Leadership Philosophy “Empower other people to solve challenges — and have a great time doing it.” That was my mission statement at Royal.

item.title: Christopher Harper — Ops Knowledge Garden
item.description: Ops Knowledge Garden You got promoted because you were good in the field. Nobody told you the job was about to change completely.

item.title: Hard Conversations
item.description: Hard Conversations Nobody teaches you this part.

item.title: Fleet Safety
item.description: Fleet Safety We reduced ambulance accidents by 30% in Year 1. This is how. Not theory. The actual methodology.

item.title: First 90 Days as an EMS Supervisor
item.description: First 90 Days as an EMS Supervisor You just got promoted. You were excellent in the field — that’s why they picked you.

item.title: ChatIR
item.description: ChatIR ChatIR is the productized version of the methodology behind this garden.
